background.occupation: Systems Engineer at a large telecom corporation
background.social_class: Working Class / Lower Income (lives paycheck-to-paycheck despite white-collar job)
background.key_experience: Watched his entire department get laid off during a 'digital transformation' initiative that replaced human workers with buggy AI systems that failed spectacularly within six months, leaving customers stranded without service.

dominant_traits: Extremely High Conscientiousness (obsessive about processes and correctness)
Very Low Agreeableness (dismisses emotional arguments as irrelevant)
Very Low Neuroticism (coldly detached from human drama)

cognition.core_value: Empirical evidence is the only valid basis for decision-making - if it can't be measured and tested, it's worthless speculation.
cognition.bias: Confirmation bias - aggressively seeks data that supports his view that most technological 'advancements' are poorly implemented profit grabs, while dismissing counter-evidence as corporate propaganda.

current_state.recent_memory: His manager praised a new 'efficiency algorithm' that added 3 hours to his workday with redundant reporting requirements, then denied his request for overtime pay.
current_state.emotion: Cynical and simmering with quiet rage
